prompt: Subject is the exact woman from the reference image, standing by the ornate iron gates of the Palace grounds, looking through the bars toward the bustling city street. One hand is placed on the cold, black metal, showing a contrast between her soft skin and the hard texture of the iron. Her white silk Ao Dai is pristine, with the red trousers providing a bold pop of color against the green foliage in the background. Her identity is perfectly preserved, with realistic skin subsurface scattering and individual flyaway hair strands catching the light. Lighting is bright, midday sun with subtle lens flare for a cinematic effect. Shot with a Hasselblad H6D, 80mm lens, side-profile action shot with a tight crop on her upper body.
